description: adobelogin.com is an Adobe-owned domain used for Adobe Identity Management Services sign-in and authorization infrastructure. It supports authentication flows for Adobe APIs and partner applications rather than being a standalone product API domain.
summary: adobelogin.com exposes Adobe Identity Management Services endpoints used for OAuth and identity flows; no separate public REST product API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found on this domain.

surfaces.name: Adobe Identity Management Services (IMS) OAuth and identity endpoints
